description: Consolidated provenance and license record for the Collect-and-Exit demo asset pack. Every asset is a deterministic local CC0 fixture authored for Ouroforge; no external, third-party, or copyrighted assets are used. Generated previews/runs/dashboard output stay untracked.
uiNote: The demo HUD is text-based (uiText/hudValue); UI icons reuse existing atlas frames (key/door/exit) rather than adding new icon binaries, to keep the pack minimal and provenance-safe.
boundary: Source-like deterministic asset provenance record only. No external/copyrighted assets, no asset upload/fetch/import, no marketplace, no committed generated output, and no full Godot parity or replacement claim.
